creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
> If I manually load amdgpu and then i915kms (using Konsole in Plasma), 
> the OS remains visibly usable. 

I should add: that was with drm-61-kmod-6.1.128.1500034_2.

Historic <https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/recall/Graphics?action=recall&rev=120#Intel_Integrated_Graphics_.28aka_HD_Graphics.29> includes a hint that was not taken to the FreeBSD Handbook: 

> … i915kms … a flash of the console when the display driver is switched. …

I see no flash, from which I assume that whilst the module does load, it is not effective. 

<https://pastebin.com/search?q=tags%3A%28bugzilla-252241%29&sort=-date> in the session at 12:34 today, in Konsole I loaded i915kms (without preloading amdgpu). Plasma remained usable until I remotely restarted SDDM. Result: a black screen.
